'''''UFC 323: Dvalishvili vs. Yan 2''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on December 6, 2025, at the [[T-Mobile Arena]] in [[Paradise, Nevada]], part of the [[Las Vegas Valley]], United States.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/09/20/ufc-las-vegas-apex-tmobile-schedule-2025/86264647007|title=UFC lays groundwork for three more Las Vegas events|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-09-20|access-date=2025-09-23}}</ref>

==Background==
This was the UFC's last pay-per-view (PPV) event before its new media deal with [[Paramount Skydance]] took effect in 2026, as the numbered events will instead be available to stream at no additional cost on [[Paramount+]] in the U.S. starting next year. The PPV model has been a hallmark of the promotion since its inception in 1993 and has been especially emphasized during the organization's seven-year broadcast partnership with [[ESPN]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://sports.yahoo.com/mma/breaking-news/article/ufc-pay-per-view-model-will-still-exist-in-paramount-era-outside-of-us-market-says-exec-000949095.html|title=UFC pay-per-view model will still exist in Paramount era outside of U.S. market, says exec|publisher=sports.yahoo.com|author=Uncrowned Staff|date=2025-09-06|access-date=2025-09-11}}</ref>

A [[UFC Bantamweight Championship]] bout between current champion [[Merab Dvalishvili]] and former champion [[Petr Yan]] headlined the event.<ref name="MerabYan2">{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/10/13/ufc-323-merab-dvalishvili-vs-petr-yan-rematch-main-event/86677550007|title=UFC 323 gets surprise headliner as Merab Dvalishvili makes quick turnaround|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-10-13|access-date=2025-10-13}}</ref> With a win, Dvalishvili would become the first UFC champion in history to defend a title four times in the same calendar year.<ref name="MerabYan2"/> The pairing previously met in March 2023 at [[UFC Fight Night: Yan vs. Dvalishvili]] which Dvalishvili won by unanimous decision.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/3/11/23635894/merab-dvalishvili-dominates-petr-yan-in-shutout-performance-in-ufc-las-vegas-main-event|title=Merab Dvalishvili dominates Petr Yan in shutout performance in UFC Las Vegas main event|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Damon Martin|date=2023-03-11|access-date=2025-10-13}}</ref>

A [[UFC Flyweight Championship]] bout between current champion [[Alexandre Pantoja]] and [[Joshua Van]] served as the co-main event.<ref name="PantojaVan">{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/10/13/ufc-323-alexandre-pantoja-vs-joshua-van-booked-title-fight/85850593007|title=UFC title fight between Alexandre Pantoja and Joshua Van official|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-10-13|access-date=2025-10-13}}</ref>

Mansur Abdul-Malik and Antonio Trócoli met in a middleweight bout at this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://sports.yahoo.com/article/mansur-abdul-malik-set-clash-134123587.html|title=Mansur Abdul-Malik set for clash with Antonio Trocoli at UFC 323|publisher=sports.yahoo.com|author=Garrett Kerman|date=2025-09-18|access-date=2025-09-18}}</ref> The pairing was initially expected to take place at [[UFC Fight Night: Cejudo vs. Song]] in late February, but Trócoli withdrew due to undisclosed reasons.<ref>{{Cite web|date=2025-01-25|title=Nick Klein steps into short-notice debut at UFC Fight Night 252 vs. Mansur Abdul-Malik|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2025/01/ufc-seattle-nick-klein-vs-mansur-abdul-malik|access-date=2025-01-25|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King}}</ref>

A light heavyweight bout between former [[Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki#Light heavyweight championship|KSW]] and [[UFC Light Heavyweight Championship|UFC Light Heavyweight Champion]] [[Jan Błachowicz]] and [[Bogdan Guskov]] was scheduled for [[UFC Fight Night: Tsarukyan vs. Hooker]].<ref>{{Cite web|date=2025-08-31|access-date=2025-08-31|title=Jan Błachowicz vs. Bogdan Guskov set for UFC Qatar debut|url=https://www.lowkickmma.com/jan-blachowicz-vs-bogdan-guskov-set-for-ufc-qatar-debut/|publisher=lowkickmma.com|author=Timothy Wheaton}}</ref> However, the pairing was moved to this event for unknown reasons.<ref name="JanBogdan">{{Cite web|author=Farah Hannoun and Nolan King|title=Jan Blachowicz meets rising contender at UFC 323|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/10/13/ufc-323-jan-blachowicz-vs-bogdan-guskov-booked/85927399007/|access-date=2025-10-13|date=2025-10-13|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com}}</ref>

A lightweight bout between [[Terrance McKinney]] and [[Chris Duncan (fighter)|Chris Duncan]] took place at the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://bloodyelbow.com/2025/10/12/ufc-lightweight-with-16-first-round-finishes-in-17-wins-will-fight-at-the-final-espn-pay-per-view/|title=UFC lightweight with 16 first-round finishes in 17 wins will fight at the final ESPN pay-per-view|publisher=bloodyelbow.com|author=Harvey Leonard|date=2025-10-12|access-date=2025-10-13}}</ref> They were first scheduled to compete at [[UFC Fight Night: Yusuff vs. Barboza]] in October 2023, but Duncan had to withdraw due to visa issues.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/Brendon-Marotte-Replaces-Chris-Duncan-in-ShortNotice-UFC-Debut-Against-Terrance-McKinney-on-Oct-14-191327|title=Brendon Marotte Replaces Chris Duncan in short-notice UFC debut against Terrance McKinney on Oct. 14|publisher=sherdog.com|author=Sayan Nag|date=2025-10-13|access-date=2025-10-13}}</ref>

A featherweight bout between [[Muhammad Naimov]] and [[The Ultimate Fighter: Team Grasso vs. Team Shevchenko]] featherweight winner Mairon Santos took place at this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/10/22/ufc-323-jalin-turner-vs-edson-barboza-news/86841463007/|title=Jalin Turner's UFC comeback announced vs. violent lightweight staple|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-10-22|access-date=2025-10-22}}</ref> The bout was originally scheduled for [[UFC Fight Night: Tsarukyan vs. Hooker]] two weeks prior but was moved to this event for undisclosed reasons.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Mairon Santos enfrenta Muhammad Naimov no UFC Catar, em novembro|url=https://agfight.com/ufc/mairon-santos-enfrenta-muhammad-naimov-no-ufc-catar-em-novembro|date=2025-10-15|access-date=2025-10-16|publisher=agfight.com|author=Diego Ribas}} {{in lang|pt-br}}</ref> At the weigh-ins, Santos weighed in at 147.5 pounds, 1.5 pounds over the featherweight non-title fight limit. The bout proceeded at catchweight and he was fined 20 percent of his purse, which went to Naimov.<ref name="Weigh">{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/ufc/459776/ufc-323-weigh-in-results-fighter-misses-weight-by-3-pounds-two-title-fights-official|title=UFC 323 weigh-in results: Fighter misses weight by 3 pounds, two title fights official|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2025-12-05|access-date=2025-12-05}}</ref>

Also at the weigh-ins, Brunno Ferreira weighed in at 189 pounds, 3 pounds over the middleweight non-title fight limit. His bout proceeded at catchweight and he was fined 20 percent of his purse which went to his opponent former [[UFC Middleweight Championship]] challenger [[Marvin Vettori]].<ref name="Weigh"/>

== Bonus awards ==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmamania.com/ufc-323-fight-card-start-time-live-results-merab-vs-yan-2-mma/407767/official-ufc-323-post-fight-bonus-winners-merab-yan-pantoja-van-espn-ppv-yan-torres-iwo|title=Bonuses! Iwo Baraniewski banks $50K for incredible 90-second UFC debut - UFC 323|publisher=mmamania.com|author=Dan Hiergesell|date=2025-12-07|access-date=2025-12-07}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night: Petr Yan vs. Merab Dvalishvili'''
*'''Performance of the Night: Manuel Torres''' and '''Iwo Baraniewski'''
